name: irreversible-guard
description: PreToolUse gate that blocks Bash commands with no practical local undo — de-obfuscates ssh/docker-exec transports, heredocs, command chains, and env prefixes, then matches a tiered deny-set (irreversible-everywhere ops block unconditionally; locally-reversible ops block only when the command names production)

interface.shortDescription: PreToolUse gate that blocks Bash commands with no practical local undo — de-obfuscates ssh/docker-exec transports, heredocs, command chains, and env prefixes, then matches a tiered deny-set (irreversible-everywhere ops block unconditionally; locally-reversible ops block only when the command names production)
interface.longDescription: PreToolUse gate that blocks Bash commands with no practical local undo — de-obfuscates ssh/docker-exec transports, heredocs, command chains, and env prefixes, then matches a tiered deny-set (irreversible-everywhere ops block unconditionally; locally-reversible ops block only when the command names production)
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the irreversible-guard plugin for this task.
